title: Stage1_SceneBible
description: Provider-agnostic scene bible: book story broken into scenes and beats. No video clip grid.

adaptation_notes.description: Tone, era, what to cut/compress, spoiler policies.

cumulative_duration_target_seconds.description: Sum of scene duration_target_seconds delivered so far.

resolution.description: Delivery target (e.g. 720p). Draft res may differ in pipeline_config.

frame_rate.description: Prefer integer 24; string forms like "24fps" accepted for legacy extracts.

total_runtime_target_seconds.description: Target film length in seconds (operator/book estimate × 60; not always 5400).

visual_lock.description: Filmable wardrobe/props/markings constants Stage 2 injects every shot (e.g. always wears signature hat; never bare-headed). Required for on-screen cast when the book shows a stable look.

wardrobe_always.description: Structured always-on wardrobe/prop phrases (hat, collar, glasses, cardigan, etc.). Free-text phrases, not a fixed enum. Omit metaphorical garments that match natural coat/skin when book art shows bare coat (e.g. 'black and white pajamas' for a B&W dog).

name_reveal_scene.description: First scene_number where given name may appear on screen/dialogue when policy is withheld_until_reveal

source_image_pages.description: PDF/book page numbers (from AVAILABLE_BOOK_IMAGES) where this character is visible; pipeline copies those plates into design_reference_images

design_reference_images.description: Filled by pipeline after Stage 1 from book_images / source_image_pages

book_reference_images.description: Alias of design_reference_images for book plates

location_seed_tokens.description: Stable Loc_* place seeds (architecture/props locks for Stage 2)

visual_lock.description: Filmable constants Stage 2 injects into visual_prompt

spoiler_register.description: Global list of withhold/reveal items Stage 2 and verifier enforce

summary.description: Spoiler-safe description of what is withheld

allowed_from_scene.description: First scene_number where reveal is OK; null = never on screen

setting.description: Human-readable place + time (not a shot list).

location_ids.description: Ordered Loc_* pins for this scene (Phase 1 may list multiple places).

primary_location_id.description: Dominant Loc_*; defaults to location_ids[0] if omitted.

duration_target_seconds.description: Story budget for this scene. Stage 2 snaps to legal clip sums.

dramatic_function.description: e.g. establish P, Viking memory, meet-cute, bar explosion

summary.description: 1–3 sentences: what happens and why it matters.

source_book_refs.description: Book file names, page ranges, or chapter notes for fidelity QA.

source_excerpts.description: Optional passages from book_text_pages_*.txt (or PDF extract) supporting this scene.

characters_on_screen.description: REQUIRED when anyone is visible: full Character_* cast for the scene (hero + supporting). Stage 2/engine multi-lock reference images from this list.

wardrobe_notes.description: Human prose: incremental wardrobe vs prior scene (who changed and why).

wardrobe_by_character.description: Structured sticky wardrobe for this scene: Character_* token → list of free-text item phrases they wear for the scene (Stage 2 restates on every clip). Include always-on items plus anything put on this scene. Prefer this over free-text-only notes.

spoiler_constraints.description: e.g. no name tags for Character_P; no reveal of X

story_beats.description: Ordered narrative/visual events. Not yet timed clips.

mood_arc.description: How music should move across the scene.

lyric_hooks.description: Optional; Stage 2 may expand into timed sections.

optional_video_provider_hint.description: Never required. Do not encode clip lengths here.

beat_id.description: Stable id within scene, e.g. b1, b2.

visual_event.description: Concrete filmable event (what we must SEE). VO fidelity lives here.

primary_subject.description: On-screen visual hero Character_* (first in Stage 2 visual_prompt). Not the off-screen narrator.

location_id.description: Loc_* for this beat when the scene has multiple location_ids.

blocking_notes.description: Eyeline / who faces whom / camera side — Stage 2 must honor.

action_class.description: Guides Stage 2 continuation: big_action/hard_cut → none, not extend.

time_weight.description: Relative weight for duration allocation (default 1). Not seconds.

must_not.description: Forbidden outcomes (name on badge, ball over wall if VO says window).

wardrobe_put_on.description: Items the primary_subject (or named cast) puts on this beat; stick for remaining clips in the scene. Free-text phrases (e.g. black-and-white dog pajamas).

wardrobe_remove.description: Items removed this beat (rare). Free-text phrases matching prior wardrobe lists.

dialogue.description: Full or partial line for this beat. Empty if none.
